column1: # Cross-validation checks for fuzzy message consolidation (-g flag)
# Feature: #96 Fuzzy Message Consolidation
# See: features/fuzzy-message-consolidation.md, features/nytprof-profiling-workflow.md
# Format: nytprof_sub <TAB> v_expression <TAB> tolerance <TAB> label <TAB> regex
# Notes on match_consolidation_patterns:
#   Called once per new key for S1 inline matching (= keys_seen) plus once per
#   S3 checkpoint attempt (= s3_calls). Total NYTProf calls = keys_seen + s3_calls.
#   The extraction rows for keys_seen and s3_calls must appear BEFORE the sum row.
# Notes on find_consolidation_candidates:
#   Called from S4 pairwise discovery loop (one call per unmatched key).
#   Also called from final pass (if enabled).
#   fc_calls in -V output is the grand total across all checkpoints and passes.
#   NYTProf total should equal this grand total within 5%.
# Notes on dice_coefficient:
#   Called from within find_consolidation_candidates for each candidate that passes the
#   trigram pre-filter. No direct counter in -V (derived from fc_calls).
#   Checked directionally only — use this to detect super-linear growth.
# Extraction rows (populate %v keys for sum expressions below)
match_consolidation_patterns
match_consolidation_patterns
match_consolidation_patterns
match_consolidation_patterns
find_consolidation_candidates
# Validation checks (use %v keys populated above)
match_consolidation_patterns
read_and_process_logs
